channel.title: Slancha Blog
channel.description: Technical deep dives, tutorials, and insights on AI engineering: model evaluation, deployment strategies, fine-tuning pipelines, and the eval-deploy-train loop.

item.title: The Case for Black Box AI Inference: Why Your Team Should Stop Picking Models
item.description: Every AI platform promises transparency and control. Slancha bets on the opposite: a black box that handles everything. Here's why that's the right call for 90% of teams using LLM APIs.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: Slancha vs. Databricks: The AI Infrastructure Showdown
item.description: Databricks gives you the tools. Slancha does the work. A detailed comparison of two fundamentally different approaches to AI infrastructure — full control vs. automatic results.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: From Prototype to Production: The AI Deployment Checklist
item.description: Most AI projects that "work" in prototype never make it to production. This checklist covers what actually breaks and how to fix it — routing, data curation, quantization, GPU efficiency, and more.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: Building a Production AI Router: Architecture Patterns That Scale
item.description: Routing requests to the right model is the easy part. The hard part is doing it at scale with sub-millisecond overhead, graceful degradation, and zero downtime deploys. Here are the architecture patterns that make it work.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: The Complete Guide to AI Model Routing: Strategies, Architecture, and Cost Optimization
item.description: Not every request needs GPT-4. Learn how intelligent model routing cuts inference costs 40-70% while maintaining quality — with architecture patterns, routing strategies, and real benchmarks.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: How Eval Data Should Drive Fine-Tuning: A Technical Deep Dive
item.description: A hands-on guide to building a closed-loop pipeline where evaluation failures automatically become training examples — with code, architecture patterns, and real metrics.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: 5 Signs Your ML Team Needs an Evaluation Platform
item.description: Spreadsheets, vibes-based deployment, and "it works on my laptop" are not an eval strategy. Here's how to know you've outgrown ad-hoc testing.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: Why Eval Data Should Drive Fine-Tuning
item.description: Most teams treat evaluation and fine-tuning as separate workflows. That disconnect is costing you model quality and engineering hours.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: The Real Cost of Stitching AI Tools Together
item.description: You're paying for 4-6 tools that don't talk to each other. The integration tax is higher than you think.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: Introducing the Slancha Router: Free Intelligent Model Routing
item.description: Route requests to the best model for the job — automatically. Free to use, no lock-in.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: Slancha vs OpenRouter: Beyond the Model Marketplace
item.description: OpenRouter gives you access to every model through one API. Slancha gives you one API that makes model selection irrelevant. A detailed comparison of two fundamentally different approaches to multi-model AI.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)

item.title: How to Reduce Your LLM API Costs by 60% Without Sacrificing Quality
item.description: LLM API bills are growing faster than usage. Here are five proven techniques — from intelligent routing to automated fine-tuning — that cut costs dramatically while maintaining or improving output quality.
item.author: team@slancha.ai (Slancha Team)
